title: volfed
description: Eliminates the Bark, Growl, and Howl wolfs sounds. Removes the TOO CUTE EYES. As well as removes tamed wolf's collars. And all together it makes the wolfs look more playful & cute when they are fighting!
body:
# volfed

### Eliminates
- Bark
- Growl
- Howl
- Collars
- Soggy Eyes

### Impliments
- Cuter wolfs
- Wolfs look cute when fighting!
